title: Vinyl Revival
description: Craft blank music discs from plastic, burn them into vanilla records, and play them on animated turntables. Explore the Nether, smelt Raw Plastic, and bring immersive audio to your world! Turntables must be placed 10+ blocks apart.
body:
# 🎵 Vinyl Revival – Bring music to life in Minecraft
**Vinyl Revival introduces a new, immersive way to create and play Minecraft’s vanilla music discs using real-world inspired materials and machines.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yX9eVei2RlM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 🧪 How it works
- Explore the Nether to find a new resource: Raw Plastic.
  
- Smelt Raw Plastic into refined Plastic, which is used to craft a blank Music Disc.
  
- Insert the blank disc into the Disc Burner to engrave it into one of Minecraft’s vanilla music discs.
  
- Play the discs using either the classic Jukebox or the new Turntable, which features a fully animated spinning vinyl.

### ⚠️ Important note
- It is recommended to place Turntables at least 8 blocks apart. Otherwise, minor audio issues or slight sound overlap may occur. These are not critical, but maintaining distance helps avoid them.

### 🛠️ Current Features
- New Nether resource: Raw Plastic
  
- Crafting system for vanilla music discs
  
- Disc Burner block to engrave blank discs
  
- Animated Turntable that plays vanilla records
  
- Fully compatible with Minecraft’s record sound system

### 👨‍💻 Developed with passion
- Created by a 15-year-old developer from Italy who loves Minecraft, music and modding — Vinyl Revival is a unique project combining creativity, technical skill and love for detail.
